info.name: Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Module API Collection
info.description: API collection for Jalan Spesifikasi Desain (Road Design Specification) module - manages design specification records for Usulan Jalan entries

variable.description: Base URL for the API server
JWT access token obtained from login
API prefix (api/dev/v1 for development, api/v1 for production)

item.name: Jalan Spesifikasi Desain
Get Jalan Spesifikasi Desain by Usulan Jalan

query.description: ID of the Usulan Jalan to get design specifications for
Number of items per page (optional, minimum 1)

request.description: Get all Jalan Spesifikasi Desain records for a specific Usulan Jalan with pagination. Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

item.description: Endpoints for retrieving Jalan Spesifikasi Desain records
